    This book is about artificial intelligence and generative AI, covering topics such as machine learning, deep learning, and large language models. It discusses the applications and risks of AI, including hallucination, bias, and job displacement. The book also explores AI governance, responsible AI principles, and AI security risks, providing a comprehensive overview of the field. It is intended for IT students, aiming to help them understand the transformative but complex nature of AI.

    $value[2]['preface']
    This book discusses the importance of data governance, data privacy, and blockchain technology in the modern digital landscape. It explores the concepts of data governance, data privacy, and blockchain, and how they intersect with emerging technologies such as Web3. The book also examines the benefits and limitations of blockchain, as well as the ethical concerns and governance challenges associated with its use. By understanding these issues, IT professionals can design responsible digital systems that protect user information and ensure secure data management.
